programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Lee writes a new editorial in the Valley Voice; Gowen worries about the oil company's intentions now that Fiona has all but secured a deal with investors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: EJ and Johnny bond; Chanel opens up to Lani; Alex asks Sarah for a favor; Jeremy misreads a moment with Stephanie; Kristen pushes Sophia to take action.

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: One Tiny Incision and a Coffin Dress
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Tammy with a difficult decision when her long-lost Aunt Cookie appears with a surprising proposition.

programme.sub-title: Silly Frills and a Depressed Garden Gnome
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie support Marjorie when she attempts to reconnect with her estranged son; Tammy sees another side of Jill while working as her employee.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When the employees start to worry about Jonah's emotional state, Mateo, Glenn and Sandra try to help him move on after Amy; Cheyenne is forced to shadow Carol for the day; Garrett helps Dina search for a secret location in the store.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Jonah finds himself in trouble with Sandra and Glenn when her son, Tony, starts working at Cloud 9; Mateo tries to help Cheyenne be a better floor supervisor; Garrett is unwittingly thrust in the middle of Dina's relationship with Brian the vet.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) thought she had everything she wanted in life: a home, a husband and a successful career. Now newly divorced and facing a turning point, she finds that she is confused about what is important to her. Daring to step out of her comfort zone, Liz embarks on a quest of self-discovery that takes her to Italy, India and Bali.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Easy A
programme.desc: Prompted by her popular best friend to spill details of her boring weekend, Olive, a clean-cut teen, decides to spice things up by telling a little lie about losing her virginity; when the high-school busybody overhears the conversation and spreads it all over campus, Olive is suddenly notorious but for the wrong reasons.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sweeter Than Chocolate
programme.desc: A local chocolatier is rumored to have the secret recipe to finding true love on Valentine's Day, drawing in a television reporter to investigate.

programme.title: Sisterhood, Inc
programme.desc: Corporate exec Megan starts a board of directors to improve her younger sister's chaotic life and finds romance with a psych professor who uncovers her tough demeanor.

programme.title: Everything Puppies
programme.desc: Looking to make it big with innovative dog toys and treats, an entrepreneur and inventor finds success with support from a handsome client.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Mayor Hickam decides that Hope Valley needs to get back to its hopeful, joyous roots and decides to host Hope Valley Days, a collective celebration inspired by giving, fun, hope, and love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Brady delivers good news to Marlena; Kayla comforts Stephanie; Sarah preps Chanel for her mammogram; Johnny tries to get through to Sophia; Shawn shows off in front of Jada.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Christy is troubled when sparks fly between Tammy and chef Rudy; Bonnie overreacts when her therapist accuses her of rejecting his help.

programme.title: Mom

programme.desc: Glenn is confused by Zephra's new store policies and enlists Sandra and Marcus to help figure out what's going on; a memory lapse causes Jonah to question his friendship with Garrett; Cheyenne and Mateo face an unexpected challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: With Carol's lawyer at Cloud 9 to depose the employees, Jonah tries to ease Glenn's nerves; Mateo enlists Sandra's help hiding the details of his work arrangement while Dina grows concerned about Garrett's behavior at customer service.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sam becomes alarmed when the ghosts suggest Jay's new friends may be part of a cult run by a charismatic leader named Micah; Pete changes his attitude after Sasappis criticizes his unceasing cheerfulness.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sasappis convinces Sam and Jay to try and save an old tree on the Woodstone property that the neighbors want to cut down; Thor attempts to become more environmentally friendly to get Flower's attention.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.sub-title: Halloween 2: The Ghost of Hetty's Past
programme.desc: A séance at Sam and Jay's last-minute Halloween party conjures up a spirit from Hetty's past; Isaac worries Nigel will be turned off by his ghost power.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The team confronts an unexpected final hurdle they need to overcome to bring Senior to justice for his role in the Wellbrexa cover-up.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines struggle to adjust to their new normal, while also recovering from the fallout of their arguments; as Marissa tries to cope with past events, Jenny deals with domestic pressures of her own and uncovers some of Richie's secrets.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: A mysterious, fast-acting and extremely deadly virus triggers an emergency lockdown on the 6th floor of Westside Hospital; in an effort to save a crashing Richard from a deadly virus, Amy gets infected with it.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: Peter takes Mindy to a bar so she can test his advice "to think like a man"; Danny tries to give Tamra relationship advice.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: A surly police officer (Tim Daly) admonishes Mindy for giving his daughter birth control pills; Danny becomes friends with a rabbi, who starts referring members of his congregation to Schulman & Associates.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Neil Melendez, Dr. Morgan Reznick and Dr. Claire Brown grapple with a patient's wish to perform an operation that would keep him from acting on his pedophilic urges; Dr. Shaun Murphy learns a lesson in empathy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy and Dr. Alex Park treat two patients who collapse at the local airport whose symptoms point to an infection that may become airborne.

programme.title: North to Home
programme.desc: The McBride sisters reunite in Alaska for a memorable birthday celebration that connects their past to the present.

programme.title: Spring Breakthrough
programme.desc: Single mother Monica receives the surprise of a lifetime when her daughter announces her engagement to Shawn. En route to the engagement celebration, Monica meets Shawn's godfather, and an unexpected flirtation ignites.

programme.title: My Birthday Romance
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a single woman and a man who poses as her boyfriend for her 35th birthday party.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Residents of Hope Valley continue to enjoy the festival, and everyone comes together to help one of their own.

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Sarah supports Chanel; Javi realizes Johnny's in trouble; Brady and Jada search for Sophia; Tate tries to lift Holly's spirits; Kristen gets revenge.

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: Cheddar Cheese and a Squirrel Circus
programme.desc: After a successful kidney transplant surgery, Bonnie is concerned that Tammy's aunt is taking her second chance for granted; Christy tries to track down a handsome stranger she believes is her soul mate.
